author: nero_eth
content:
I've just updated the snap/2 EIP, adding `bytes` to `GetBlockAccessList` for the soft cap, as well as changing the "missing BAL" response to `0x80`:
https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11498
The two points were raised by jonny [here](https://github.com/ethereum/go-ethereum/pull/34083#discussion_r3019588205).

cc <@&1460290804898861117>
